title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 479.130 - Trial by jury, when
text:
479.130.  Trial by jury, when. — Any person charged with the violation of a municipal ordinance of a city of the third or fourth class shall be entitled to a trial by jury, as in prosecutions for misdemeanors before an associate circuit judge.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
